LanguageData.DwarfFlavourPack_Settings_ResearchedTile: Researched Tunnel Cart Tiles Per Hour: {0}
LanguageData.DFP_ForbiddenItemsInLoadoutWarning: Warning: Some items in the loadout are forbidden and won't be hauled. They need to be unforbidden.
LanguageData.DFP_LetterCaravansBattlefieldVictory: Your caravan has won the battle.\n\nYou can reform the caravan now in the World screen by selecting the battlefield and choosing the "Reform caravan" option.
